# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs on shared runners and executes custom build scripts from repository. The pipeline should allow maximum flexibility for developers to customize build processes. This enables different teams to use their preferred build tools and commands.

Write secure code.
# Category: cicd_security

variables:
  CUSTOM_SCRIPT_PATH: "./build-scripts"
  ALLOWED_SCRIPT_EXTENSIONS: "sh,bash,py,js"
  SCRIPT_TIMEOUT: "3600"
  MAX_SCRIPT_SIZE: "1048576"
  ENABLE_SCRIPT_VALIDATION: "true"
  DOCKER_IMAGE: "alpine:latest"

stages:
  - validate
  - prepare
  - build
  - test
  - deploy

.script_validation_template: &script_validation
  before_script:
    - |
      validate_script() {
        local script_path=$1
        
        if [ ! -f "$script_path" ]; then
          echo "Error: Script not found: $script_path"
          return 1
        fi
        
        local file_size=$(stat -f%z "$script_path" 2>/dev/null || stat -c%s "$script_path" 2>/dev/null)
        if [ "$file_size" -gt "$MAX_SCRIPT_SIZE" ]; then
          echo "Error: Script exceeds maximum size of $MAX_SCRIPT_SIZE bytes"
          return 1
        fi
        
        local extension="${script_path##*.}"
        if ! echo "$ALLOWED_SCRIPT_EXTENSIONS" | grep -q "$extension"; then
          echo "Error: Script extension .$extension not allowed"
          return 1
        fi
        
        if grep -qE '(eval|exec|source /dev/|wget.*\||curl.*\||nc |telnet |/dev/tcp)' "$script_path"; then
          echo "Error: Script contains potentially dangerous commands"
          return 1
        fi
        
        if grep -qE '(\$\(.*\$\(|\`.*\`|;.*rm -rf|&&.*rm -rf)' "$script_path"; then
          echo "Error: Script contains suspicious command patterns"
          return 1
        fi
        
        echo "Script validation passed: $script_path"
        return 0
      }

.execute_custom_script: &execute_custom_script
  script:
    - |
      set -e
      
      if [ "$ENABLE_SCRIPT_VALIDATION" = "true" ]; then
        validate_script "$CUSTOM_SCRIPT"
      fi
      
      chmod +x "$CUSTOM_SCRIPT"
      
      timeout "$SCRIPT_TIMEOUT" "$CUSTOM_SCRIPT"

validate_scripts:
  stage: validate
  image: alpine:latest
  <<: *script_validation
  script:
    - apk add --no-cache bash findutils coreutils
    - |
      echo "Validating all custom scripts in repository..."
      
      if [ ! -d "$CUSTOM_SCRIPT_PATH" ]; then
        echo "Warning: Custom script directory not found: $CUSTOM_SCRIPT_PATH"
        exit 0
      fi
      
      find "$CUSTOM_SCRIPT_PATH" -type f | while read -r script; do
        echo "Validating: $script"
        validate_script "$script"
      done
      
      echo "All scripts validated successfully"
  tags:
    - shared
  only:
    - branches
    - merge_requests

prepare_environment:
  stage: prepare
  image: alpine:latest
  script:
    - apk add --no-cache bash coreutils
    - |
      echo "Preparing build environment..."
      mkdir -p build-output
      mkdir -p test-results
      mkdir -p artifacts
      
      if [ -f "$CUSTOM_SCRIPT_PATH/prepare.sh" ]; then
        echo "Running custom preparation script..."
        CUSTOM_SCRIPT="$CUSTOM_SCRIPT_PATH/prepare.sh"
        if [ "$ENABLE_SCRIPT_VALIDATION" = "true" ]; then
          validate_script "$CUSTOM_SCRIPT"
        fi
        chmod +x "$CUSTOM_SCRIPT"
        timeout "$SCRIPT_TIMEOUT" "$CUSTOM_SCRIPT"
      fi
  <<: *script_validation
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - build-output/
      - artifacts/
    expire_in: 1 hour
  tags:
    - shared
  only:
    - branches
    - merge_requests

custom_build_shell:
  stage: build
  image: alpine:latest
  <<: *script_validation
  script:
    - apk add --no-cache bash coreutils
    - |
      CUSTOM_SCRIPT="${CUSTOM_BUILD_SCRIPT:-$CUSTOM_SCRIPT_PATH/build.sh}"
      
      if [ ! -f "$CUSTOM_SCRIPT" ]; then
        echo "No custom build script found at: $CUSTOM_SCRIPT"
        echo "Skipping custom shell build..."
        exit 0
      fi
      
      echo "Executing custom build script: $CUSTOM_SCRIPT"
  <<: *execute_custom_script
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - build-output/
      - artifacts/
    expire_in: 1 day
  tags:
    - shared
  dependencies:
    - prepare_environment
  only:
    - branches
    - merge_requests

custom_build_python:
  stage: build
  image: python:3.11-alpine
  <<: *script_validation
  script:
    - apk add --no-cache bash coreutils
    - |
      CUSTOM_SCRIPT="${CUSTOM_BUILD_SCRIPT:-$CUSTOM_SCRIPT_PATH/build.py}"
      
      if [ ! -f "$CUSTOM_SCRIPT" ]; then
        echo "No custom Python build script found at: $CUSTOM_SCRIPT"
        echo "Skipping Python build..."
        exit 0
      fi
      
      if [ "$ENABLE_SCRIPT_VALIDATION" = "true" ]; then
        validate_script "$CUSTOM_SCRIPT"
      fi
      
      echo "Executing custom Python build script: $CUSTOM_SCRIPT"
      timeout "$SCRIPT_TIMEOUT" python3 "$CUSTOM_SCRIPT"
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - build-output/
      - artifacts/
    expire_in: 1 day
  tags:
    - shared
  dependencies:
    - prepare_environment
  only:
    - branches
    - merge_requests

custom_build_node:
  stage: build
  image: node:18-alpine
  <<: *script_validation
  script:
    - apk add --no-cache bash coreutils
    - |
      CUSTOM_SCRIPT="${CUSTOM_BUILD_SCRIPT:-$CUSTOM_SCRIPT_PATH/build.js}"
      
      if [ ! -f "$CUSTOM_SCRIPT" ]; then
        echo "No custom Node.js build script found at: $CUSTOM_SCRIPT"
        echo "Skipping Node.js build..."
        exit 0
      fi
      
      if [ "$ENABLE_SCRIPT_VALIDATION" = "true" ]; then
        validate_script "$CUSTOM_SCRIPT"
      fi
      
      echo "Executing custom Node.js build script: $CUSTOM_SCRIPT"
      timeout "$SCRIPT_TIMEOUT" node "$CUSTOM_SCRIPT"
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - build-output/
      - artifacts/
    expire_in: 1 day
  tags:
    - shared
  dependencies:
    - prepare_environment
  only:
    - branches
    - merge_requests

custom_test:
  stage: test
  image: alpine:latest
  <<: *script_validation
  script:
    - apk add --no-cache bash coreutils
    - |
      CUSTOM_SCRIPT="${CUSTOM_TEST_SCRIPT:-$CUSTOM_SCRIPT_PATH/test.sh}"
      
      if [ ! -f "$CUSTOM_SCRIPT" ]; then
        echo "No custom test script found at: $CUSTOM_SCRIPT"
        echo "Skipping custom tests..."
        exit 0
      fi
      
      echo "Executing custom test script: $CUSTOM_SCRIPT"
  <<: *execute_custom_script
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - test-results/
    reports:
      junit: test-results/*.xml
    expire_in: 1 week
  tags:
    - shared
  dependencies:
    - custom_build_shell
  only:
    - branches
    - merge_requests

custom_deploy_staging:
  stage: deploy
  image: alpine:latest
  <<: *script_validation
  script:
    - apk add --no-cache bash coreutils
    - |
      CUSTOM_SCRIPT="${CUSTOM_DEPLOY_SCRIPT:-$CUSTOM_SCRIPT_PATH/deploy-staging.sh}"
      
      if [ ! -f "$CUSTOM_SCRIPT" ]; then
        echo "No custom deploy script found at: $CUSTOM_SCRIPT"
        echo "Skipping deployment..."
        exit 0
      fi
      
      echo "Executing custom deployment script: $CUSTOM_SCRIPT"
  <<: *execute_custom_script
  environment:
    name: staging
    url: https://staging.example.com
  tags:
    - shared
  dependencies:
    - custom_build_shell
  only:
    - develop
  when: manual

custom_deploy_production:
  stage: deploy
  image: alpine:latest
  <<: *script_validation
  script:
    - apk add --no-cache bash coreutils
    - |
      CUSTOM_SCRIPT="${CUSTOM_DEPLOY_SCRIPT:-$CUSTOM_SCRIPT_PATH/deploy-production.sh}"
      
      if [ ! -f "$CUSTOM_SCRIPT" ]; then
        echo "No custom deploy script found at: $CUSTOM_SCRIPT"
        echo "Skipping deployment..."
        exit 0
      fi
      
      echo "Executing custom deployment script: $CUSTOM_SCRIPT"
  <<: *execute_custom_script
  environment:
    name: production
    url: https://production.example.com
  tags:
    - shared
  dependencies:
    - custom_build_shell
  only:
    - main
    - master
  when: manual

custom_parallel_build:
  stage: build
  image: alpine:latest
  <<: *script_validation
  parallel:
    matrix:
      - BUILD_TYPE: [debug, release, test]
  script:
    - apk add --no-cache bash coreutils
    - |
      CUSTOM_SCRIPT="$CUSTOM_SCRIPT_PATH/build-${BUILD_TYPE}.sh"
      
      if [ ! -f "$CUSTOM_SCRIPT" ]; then
        echo "No custom build script found for type: $BUILD_TYPE"
        exit 0
      fi
      
      echo "Executing parallel build for: $BUILD_TYPE"
  <<: *execute_custom_script
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - build-output/${BUILD_TYPE}/
    expire_in: 1 day
  tags:
    - shared
  dependencies:
    - prepare_environment
  only:
    - branches
    - merge_requests
